content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

1. What is the Current Market Regime?
RISK-ON: Normal volatility 25.9% with broad participation; Breadth 7/8 sectors positive. Vol: 25.9%. Breadth: 7/8.

2. Which sectors are leading?
Technology & Telecom and Energy & Chemicals are outperforming with strong momentum: KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND. Construction & REIT also running: TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND.

3. Which sectors are lagging?
Transportation is the lone laggard on the week: TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION, PGSUS (1W: +4.51% | 1M: +10.31%) ABOVE TREND but mixed within the group. Retail & Food is positive but weaker relative to leaders: SOKM (1W: -6.39% | 1M: -1.03%) BELOW TREND.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

4. Top Performing Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, TRALT (1W: +10.66% | 1M: +0.65%) ABOVE TREND.

5. Worst Performing Stocks?
TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION, SOKM (1W: -6.39% | 1M: -1.03%) BELOW TREND, TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND, OYAKC (1W: -0.23% | 1M: +10.28%) CORRECTION, AEFES (1W: +0.62% | 1M: +10.91%) ABOVE TREND.

6. Momentum Stocks?
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND, GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND, HEKTS (1W: +8.85% | 1M: +11.78%) ABOVE TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

7. Banking Sector Outlook?
Banking confirms the market bid; AKBNK (1W: +6.57% | 1M: +13.91%) ABOVE TREND, GARAN (1W: +4.27% | 1M: +12.16%) ABOVE TREND, ISCTR (1W: +2.72% | 1M: +11.11%) ABOVE TREND, YKBNK (1W: +1.66% | 1M: +10.89%) ABOVE TREND — tilt overweight on earnings leverage and rate stability.

8. Industrial Sector Outlook?
Heavy industry is constructive: EREGL (1W: +2.36% | 1M: +13.30%) ABOVE TREND, FROTO (1W: +3.80% | 1M: +3.41%) ABOVE TREND, ASELS (1W: +3.89% | 1M: +18.71%) ABOVE TREND — prefer cyclicals exposed to global demand, keep sizing on exporters.

9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?
Mixed: SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND and GUBRF (1W: +10.89% | 1M: +5.27%) ABOVE TREND lead the group, while TUPRS (1W: -0.59% | 1M: -0.69%) BELOW TREND signals stock-specific pressure; be selective within the sector.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

10. Portfolio Recommendation?
Risk-on posture: overweight Technology & Telecom, Construction & REIT, selective Heavy Industry and Banks; underweight Transportation and underperforming Energy names like TUPRS. Trim positions that show divergence between strong 1M and weak 1W (short-term profit-taking candidates).

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?
KONTR (1W: +35.54% | 1M: +45.78%) ABOVE TREND for momentum continuation, SASA (1W: +19.85% | 1M: +30.29%) ABOVE TREND for sector leadership, TKFEN (1W: +12.27% | 1M: +49.50%) ABOVE TREND for construction flows, AKBNK (1W: +6.57% | 1M: +13.91%) ABOVE TREND for bank flows, TAVHL (1W: -7.45% | 1M: +9.40%) CORRECTION for mean-reversion watch.

12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?
Technology & Telecom for momentum and flow, Construction & REIT for domestic cyclical upside, Energy & Chemicals for dispersion between winners and laggards. Monitor cross-sector rotation into cyclicals.

13. Key Levels & Triggers?
Watch XU100 for continuation above recent swing highs to confirm RISK-ON; downside breaches on broad profit-taking would signal quick rotation. Key catalysts: Q1 earnings, CBRT communications, USD/TRY moves and global risk sentiment.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Normal-volatility RISK-ON environment with 7/8 sector breadth positive; leadership is concentrated in Technology, Energy Chemicals and Construction. Trade overweight cyclicals and select banks, underweight Transportation and idiosyncratic energy laggards while monitoring earnings and central bank cues.
